'''zalubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ugliness|ugliness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ugliness|ugliness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zalubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zælibith|zælibith]] || [[word:zælibij|zælibij]] || [[word:zælibish|zælibish]] || [[word:zælibi|zælibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalulubuth|zalulubuth]] || [[word:zalulubuj|zalulubuj]] || [[word:zalulubush|zalulubush]] || [[word:zalulubu|zalulubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalubuth|zalubuth]] || [[word:zalubuj|zalubuj]] || [[word:zalubush|zalubush]] || [[word:zalubu|zalubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalufbuth|zalufbuth]] || [[word:zalufbuj|zalufbuj]] || [[word:zalufbush|zalufbush]] || [[word:zalufbuf|zalufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zalubuthu|zalubuthu]] || [[word:zalubuju|zalubuju]] || [[word:zalubushu|zalubushu]] || [[word:zalubuku|zalubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zalubuth|zalubuth]] || [[word:zalubuj|zalubuj]] || [[word:zalubush|zalubush]] || [[word:zalubu|zalubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zalubuthul|zalubuthul]] || [[word:zalubujul|zalubujul]] || [[word:zalubushul|zalubushul]] || [[word:zalubukul|zalubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zalubuthuthu|zalubuthuthu]] || [[word:zalubujuju|zalubujuju]] || [[word:zalubushushu|zalubushushu]] || [[word:zalubuku|zalubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zalubuthun|zalubuthun]] || [[word:zalubujun|zalubujun]] || [[word:zalubushun|zalubushun]] || [[word:zalubukun|zalubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zalubuthuoro|zalubuthuoro]] || [[word:zalubujuoro|zalubujuoro]] || [[word:zalubushuoro|zalubushuoro]] || [[word:zalubukuoro|zalubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
